creator: supraexpress@globaleyes.net
text:
1) Mount USB device (SanDisk camera memory card reader + memory card)
2) work with files on USB device
3) select device (as non-root user)
4) click on "Unmount Volume"  from context menu (as non-root user)
5) "Cannot unmount volume" error popup appears
6) Details: "umount: /usbdrive: not a file system root directory"
    Properties: "Mount Point: /usbMSDOS"
    fstab:  "/dev/da0s1 /usbdrive ufs rw,noauto 0 0"
               "/dev/da0s1 /usbMSDOS msdosfs rw,noauto 0 0"

Fix: 

Manually unmount device (as root user)
